holdings.infoBox: AAUA is an equity ETF with a total of 393 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.67%, Apple at 7.50%, Microsoft at 4.83%, Amazon.com at 3.95%, and Alphabet at 3.65%.

overview.description: The Alpha Architect US Equity 3 ETF (AAUA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through broad exposure to US equities. As part of the strategy, the fund also employs a dividend-timing strategy. AAUA was launched on Mar 18, 2026 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
